Title: Ensure 'Enforce password history' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
Remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Account Policies > Password Policy > Enforce password history = 24

Title: Ensure 'Maximum password age' is set to '365 or fewer days, but not 0'
Reason: Value is 0 (password never expires), which is not permitted.
Remediation: Set Maximum password age to 365 or fewer days (not 0).

Title: Ensure 'Accounts: Block Microsoft accounts' is set to 'Users can't add or log on with Microsoft accounts'
Ensure 'Interactive logon: Do not require CTRL+ALT+DEL' is set to 'Disabled'
Reason: DisableCAD is set to 1 (CTRL+ALT+DEL not required).

Title: Ensure 'Audit Credential Validation' is set to 'Success and Failure'
Ensure 'Configure Attack Surface Reduction rules' is set to 'Enabled'
Reason: Manual check required — ASR rule GUIDs must be reviewed per environment.
Remediation: Enable ASR rules via Group Policy and verify GUIDs are appropriate for the environment.
